summary.en: Air-source heat pump equipment sold in the United States must be listed or certified by a Nationally Recognized Testing Laboratory (NRTL) approved by OSHA under 29 CFR Part 1910.7. The applicable product safety standard is UL 60335-2-40 (Standard for Safety of Household and Similar Electrical Appliances — Part 2-40: Particular Requirements for Electrical Heat Pumps, Air-Conditioners and Dehumidifiers), the US adoption of IEC 60335-2-40 with national deviations. NRTL listing (e.g., UL Listed, ETL Listed, CSA Certified) is required for field installation — US electrical codes (NEC NFPA 70), state and local AHJ (Authority Having Jurisdiction) requirements, and utility interconnection rules all require NRTL-listed equipment. Without an NRTL listing, the product cannot be legally installed by licensed electricians in the US.
summary.zh: 在美国销售的空气源热泵设备，必须经OSHA依据29 CFR第1910.7条批准的国家认可测试实验室（NRTL）认证或列名。适用的产品安全标准为UL 60335-2-40（家用及类似电气器具安全标准——第2-40部分：电热泵、空调及除湿机的特殊要求），该标准为IEC 60335-2-40在美国含国家偏差的采用版本。现场安装要求NRTL列名（如UL Listed、ETL Listed、CSA Certified）——美国电气规范（NFPA 70 NEC）、州及地方AHJ（授权监管机构）要求以及公用事业互联规则均要求NRTL列名设备。未获NRTL列名的产品，不得由美国持证电工合法安装。
summary.zht: 在美國銷售的空氣源熱泵設備，必須經OSHA依據29 CFR第1910.7條批准的國家認可測試實驗室（NRTL）認證或列名。適用的產品安全標準為UL 60335-2-40（家用及類似電氣器具安全標準——第2-40部分：電熱泵、空調及除濕機的特殊要求），該標準為IEC 60335-2-40在美國含國家偏差的採用版本。現場安裝要求NRTL列名（如UL Listed、ETL Listed、CSA Certified）——美國電氣規範（NFPA 70 NEC）、州及地方AHJ（授權監管機構）要求以及公用事業互聯規則均要求NRTL列名設備。未獲NRTL列名的產品，不得由美國持證電工合法安裝。

standards_or_laws: UL 60335-2-40 — Standard for Safety of Household and Similar Electrical Appliances — Part 2-40: Particular Requirements for Electrical Heat Pumps, Air-Conditioners and Dehumidifiers (NRTL listing standard)
29 CFR Part 1910.7 — OSHA NRTL Programme (defines NRTL approval criteria)
NFPA 70 (NEC) — National Electrical Code (field installation requirement)

summary.en: China's equivalent product safety standard is GB 4706.32 (Particular requirements for heat pumps, air-conditioners and dehumidifiers), which is derived from the IEC 60335-2-40 family. Mandatory compliance with GB 4706.32 is required for domestic market sale and is part of the CCC (China Compulsory Certification) scheme administered by CNCA. However, GB 4706.32 certification by a Chinese CCC-authorised laboratory is not recognised under the US NRTL programme — the two conformity assessment systems are separate, and there is no bilateral recognition agreement. Products holding CCC certification under GB 4706.32 still require independent NRTL listing under UL 60335-2-40 for US market access.
summary.zh: 中国对应产品安全标准为GB 4706.32（热泵、空调及除湿机的特殊要求），源自IEC 60335-2-40系列。国内市场销售须强制符合GB 4706.32，该标准属于CNCA管理的CCC（中国强制认证）体系。然而，由中国CCC授权实验室依据GB 4706.32出具的认证，不在美国NRTL计划认可范围内——两套合格评定体系相互独立，没有双边认可协议。持有GB 4706.32 CCC认证的产品，进入美国市场仍须按UL 60335-2-40独立取得NRTL列名。
summary.zht: 中國對應產品安全標準為GB 4706.32（熱泵、空調及除濕機的特殊要求），源自IEC 60335-2-40系列。國內市場銷售須強制符合GB 4706.32，該標準屬於CNCA管理的CCC（中國強制認證）體系。然而，由中國CCC授權實驗室依據GB 4706.32出具的認證，不在美國NRTL計劃認可範圍內——兩套合格評定體系相互獨立，沒有雙邊認可協議。持有GB 4706.32 CCC認證的產品，進入美國市場仍須按UL 60335-2-40獨立取得NRTL列名。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.32 — Household and similar electrical appliances — Safety — Particular requirements for heat pumps, air-conditioners and dehumidifiers (CNCA/CCC mandatory)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — Administered by CNCA under the SAMR framework

gap.en: NRTL listing under UL 60335-2-40 is a hard market access gate — without it, products cannot be installed by licensed US electricians, and US distributors and installers will not accept them. The gap involves: (1) engaging a OSHA-approved NRTL (e.g., UL, Intertek ETL, CSA Group, MET Laboratories) to test the product to UL 60335-2-40 including US national deviations; (2) resolving any design differences arising from US-specific construction or electrical requirements (e.g., US 240V/60Hz vs Chinese 220V/50Hz, US conduit and wire gauge requirements); (3) applying the NRTL mark to the product and maintaining ongoing factory surveillance. Chinese CCC GB 4706.32 certification does not substitute. Typical NRTL listing takes 3-6 months and requires product samples to be physically present in the US or at an NRTL laboratory.
gap.zh: UL 60335-2-40下的NRTL列名是市场准入的硬门槛——未获列名的产品不得由美国持证电工安装，美国分销商和安装商也不会接受。差距包括：（1）委托OSHA批准的NRTL（如UL、Intertek ETL、CSA Group、MET Laboratories）按包含美国国家偏差的UL 60335-2-40对产品进行测试；（2）解决因美国特定结构或电气要求产生的任何设计差异（如美国240V/60Hz与中国220V/50Hz之差异、美国线管及线径要求）；（3）在产品上施加NRTL标志并维持持续的工厂监督。中国CCC GB 4706.32认证不可替代。典型NRTL列名需3-6个月，且要求产品样品实物在美国或NRTL实验室。
gap.zht: UL 60335-2-40下的NRTL列名是市場准入的硬門檻——未獲列名的產品不得由美國持證電工安裝，美國分銷商和安裝商也不會接受。差距包括：（1）委託OSHA批准的NRTL（如UL、Intertek ETL、CSA Group、MET Laboratories）按包含美國國家偏差的UL 60335-2-40對產品進行測試；（2）解決因美國特定結構或電氣要求產生的任何設計差異（如美國240V/60Hz與中國220V/50Hz之差異、美國線管及線徑要求）；（3）在產品上施加NRTL標誌並維持持續的工廠監督。中國CCC GB 4706.32認證不可替代。典型NRTL列名需3-6個月，且要求產品樣品實物在美國或NRTL實驗室。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — NRTL listing required for legal field installation under NEC and AHJ requirements in the US; de facto required by all distributors and utility interconnection programmes
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — CCC certification under GB 4706.32 required by CNCA before domestic sale

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] NRTL listing under UL 60335-2-40 is a hard market access gate for air-source heat pumps in the US. Chinese CCC certification under GB 4706.32 does not substitute. Exporters must engage an OSHA-approved NRTL and test to UL 60335-2-40 including US national deviations. Voltage/frequency and physical construction differences between Chinese and US product variants must be resolved before testing.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】UL 60335-2-40下的NRTL列名是空气源热泵进入美国市场的硬门槛。中国GB 4706.32 CCC认证不可替代。出口商须委托OSHA批准的NRTL，并按包含美国国家偏差的UL 60335-2-40进行测试。测试前须解决中美产品版本之间的电压/频率及物理结构差异。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】UL 60335-2-40下的NRTL列名是空氣源熱泵進入美國市場的硬門檻。中國GB 4706.32 CCC認證不可替代。出口商須委託OSHA批准的NRTL，並按包含美國國家偏差的UL 60335-2-40進行測試。測試前須解決中美產品版本之間的電壓/頻率及物理結構差異。

requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant Handling — EPA Section 608 Technician Certification
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂处理——EPA第608条技术人员认证
requirement_topic.zht: 制冷劑處理——EPA第608條技術人員認證

summary.en: Under Section 608 of the Clean Air Act (40 CFR Part 82 Subpart F), technicians who service, maintain, repair, or dispose of appliances containing refrigerants must be certified by an EPA-approved certification programme. This is not a product certification — it is a requirement on the service technician. However, it directly affects the US market: installers and HVAC contractors who install or service imported heat pumps must hold Section 608 certification appropriate to the equipment type (Type I: small appliances; Type II: high-pressure appliances; Type III: low-pressure appliances; or Universal). US importers and distributors should ensure their service networks are Section 608 certified. Products using non-standard refrigerants that technicians are unfamiliar with may face service network gaps.
summary.zh: 依据《清洁空气法》第608条（40 CFR第82部分F子部分），对含制冷剂设备进行维修、保养、修理或处置的技术人员，必须获得EPA批准认证项目的认证。这不是产品认证——而是对服务技术人员的要求。但其直接影响美国市场：安装或维护进口热泵的安装商和HVAC承包商，必须持有与设备类型相符的第608条认证（I类：小型设备；II类：高压设备；III类：低压设备；或万能认证）。美国进口商和分销商应确保其服务网络已获第608条认证。使用技术人员不熟悉的非标准制冷剂的产品，可能面临服务网络差距。
summary.zht: 依據《清潔空氣法》第608條（40 CFR第82部分F子部分），對含制冷劑設備進行維修、保養、修理或處置的技術人員，必須獲得EPA批准認證項目的認證。這不是產品認證——而是對服務技術人員的要求。但其直接影響美國市場：安裝或維護進口熱泵的安裝商和HVAC承包商，必須持有與設備類型相符的第608條認證（I類：小型設備；II類：高壓設備；III類：低壓設備；或萬能認證）。美國進口商和分銷商應確保其服務網絡已獲第608條認證。使用技術人員不熟悉的非標準制冷劑的產品，可能面臨服務網絡差距。

standards_or_laws: Clean Air Act Section 608 (42 U.S.C. § 7671g) — Servicing of motor vehicle air conditioners and other appliances
40 CFR Part 82 Subpart F — Recycling and Emissions Reduction (technician certification requirements)

summary.en: China requires HVAC and refrigeration technicians to hold relevant vocational qualifications under the Ministry of Human Resources and Social Security (MOHRSS) framework. The specific refrigerant handling qualifications differ in scope and examination content from US Section 608 certification. Chinese technician qualifications are not recognised in the US, and US-licensed contractors working with imported Chinese heat pumps must independently hold Section 608 certification.
summary.zh: 中国要求暖通空调和制冷技术人员按人力资源和社会保障部（MOHRSS）框架持有相关职业资格。具体的制冷剂处理资格在范围和考试内容上与美国第608条认证不同。中国技术人员资格在美国不受认可，在美国从事进口中国热泵工作的持证承包商须独立持有第608条认证。
summary.zht: 中國要求暖通空調和制冷技術人員按人力資源和社會保障部（MOHRSS）框架持有相關職業資格。具體的制冷劑處理資格在範圍和考試內容上與美國第608條認證不同。中國技術人員資格在美國不受認可，在美國從事進口中國熱泵工作的持證承包商須獨立持有第608條認證。

standards_or_laws: MOHRSS vocational qualification framework — refrigeration and HVAC technician levels (China domestic)

gap.en: Section 608 certification is a service-network gap rather than a product documentation gap. For Chinese manufacturers entering the US market with novel refrigerants (e.g., R-32, R-454B, R-290), the gap is compounded because US HVAC technicians may have limited familiarity with handling procedures, leak detection methods, and recovery requirements for these refrigerants. Manufacturers should provide US-market technical training materials and verify that their US distributor and installer networks hold current Section 608 Universal certification.
gap.zh: 第608条认证是服务网络差距，而非产品文件差距。对于采用新型制冷剂（如R-32、R-454B、R-290）进入美国市场的中国制造商，差距更为明显，因为美国HVAC技术人员对这些制冷剂的处理程序、泄漏检测方法和回收要求可能了解有限。制造商应提供美国市场技术培训材料，并核实其美国分销商和安装商网络持有现行第608条万能认证。
gap.zht: 第608條認證是服務網絡差距，而非產品文件差距。對於採用新型制冷劑（如R-32、R-454B、R-290）進入美國市場的中國製造商，差距更為明顯，因為美國HVAC技術人員對這些制冷劑的處理程序、洩漏檢測方法和回收要求可能了解有限。製造商應提供美國市場技術培訓材料，並核實其美國分銷商和安裝商網絡持有現行第608條萬能認證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Section 608 certification required for service technicians under Clean Air Act; not a product certification but affects service network and market readiness
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for technicians — MOHRSS vocational qualification required for domestic HVAC technicians; different scope from US Section 608

source.publisher: US Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) — Section 608 / Clean Air Act

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Section 608 certification is a technician requirement, not a product certification. However, it affects US market readiness: importers must ensure their service networks hold Section 608 certification. For novel refrigerants (R-32, R-454B, R-290), additional technician training and tooling (compatible recovery equipment, leak detectors) may be required. Chinese technician qualifications are not recognised.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】第608条认证是技术人员要求，而非产品认证。但其影响美国市场准备度：进口商须确保服务网络持有第608条认证。对于新型制冷剂（R-32、R-454B、R-290），可能需要额外的技术人员培训和工具（兼容的回收设备、泄漏检测仪）。中国技术人员资格不受认可。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】第608條認證是技術人員要求，而非產品認證。但其影響美國市場準備度：進口商須確保服務網絡持有第608條認證。對於新型制冷劑（R-32、R-454B、R-290），可能需要額外的技術人員培訓和工具（相容的回收設備、洩漏檢測儀）。中國技術人員資格不受認可。
